affected_pattern: Complaint-response-time SLA missed for 20% of enterprise tickets
root_cause: Ticket routing regression — a CRM upgrade mis-routed enterprise tickets to the consumer queue, adding hours of triage latency and breaching the 4-hour enterprise response SLA.
supporting_evidence: SLA Breach RCA Playbook: Enterprise-Ticket Misroute pattern
Ticket queue distribution shifted 20% toward consumer after upgrade
Customer segment tag stripped by the upgrade's normalizer
recommended_action: Restore the customer-segment tag retention in the CRM normalizer
Issue SLA credits per contract for each breached ticket
Retroactively re-route open enterprise tickets to the correct queue
Add an integration test asserting segment preservation end-to-end
